mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(TOTAL.TOTAL_CNT, 0) AS TOTAL_CNT, NVL(MONTH_STAT.TODAY_CNT, 0) AS TODAY_CNT, NVL(MONTH_STAT.MONTH_CNT, 0) AS MONTH_CNT, NVL(MONTH_STAT.VACATION_CNT, 0) AS VACATION_CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( SELECT P.ANN_NO AS SCHEDULE_NO, 'NOTICE' AS SCHEDULE_TY FROM APT_ANN_BOARD_POST P INNER JOIN APT_BOARD_INSTANCE BI ON P.BOARD_NO = BI.BOARD_NO WHERE BI.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND BI.USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.DEL_YN = 'N'
UNION ALL
SELECT CS.SCHEDULE_NO, CS.SCHDL_STTS_CD AS SCHEDULE_TY FROM COMPLEX_SCHEDULE CS WHERE CS.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND CS.SCHDL_STTS_CD IN ('EVENT', 'CONSTRUCTION')
UNION ALL
SELECT VS.VACATION_SCHDL_NO, 'VACATION' AS SCHEDULE_TY FROM MNGR_VACATION_SCHDL VS INNER JOIN MANAGER MG ON VS.USER_NO = MG.USER_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MG.MGMT_OFC_NO = MO.MGMT_OFC_NO WHERE MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND MO.USE_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'METER_' || MH.METER_HSTRY_NO, 'METER' AS SCHEDULE_TY FROM METER_HSTRY MH INNER JOIN FACILITY F ON MH.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO WHERE F.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND F.USE_YN = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'CHECK_' || FH.FAC_CHK_HSTRY_NO, 'CHECK' AS SCHEDULE_TY FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY FH INNER JOIN FACILITY F ON FH.FACILITY_NO = F.FACILITY_NO WHERE F.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} ) ALL_CAL WHERE 1 = 1 ) TOTAL, ( SELECT NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN CAL.START_DT AND CAL.END_DT THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS TODAY_CNT,
COUNT(*) AS MONTH_CNT,
NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN CAL.SCHEDULE_TY = 'VACATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS VACATION_CNT FROM (
) CAL WHERE 1 = 1
AND CAL.SCHEDULE_TY = #{scheduleTy}
AND ( UPPER(CAL.SCHEDULE_TTL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(CAL.SCHEDULE_CN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(CAL.LOC_CN) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(CAL.USER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
) MONTH_STAT
mapper.update:
/* kr.or.ddit.domain.apt.mgmtOffice.main.mapper.IAptScheduleCalendarMapper.updateVacationSchedule */ /* 직원 휴가 일정 수정 */
UPDATE MNGR_VACATION_SCHDL SET SCHDL_BGNG_DT = TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') /** 일정시작일자 */ , SCHDL_END_DT = TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') /** 일정종료일자 */ , SCHDL_TTL = #{scheduleSttsCd} /** 일정제목 */ , COLOR_CD = NVL(#{colorCd}, 'PURPLE') /** 색상코드 */ , USER_NO = #{userNo} /** 직원번호 */ WHERE VACATION_SCHDL_NO = #{scheduleNo} /** 휴가일정번호 */ AND USER_NO IN ( SELECT USER_NO FROM MANAGER WHERE MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} )
mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_NO_CD AS SCHDL_STTS_CD, CODE_NAME AS SCHDL_STTS_NM, CODE_CONTENT AS SCHDL_STTS_CN,
/* * REGEXP_SUBSTR란? * 문자열에서 특정 패턴을 찾아 잘라내는 Oracle 함수. * 왜 사용? * CODE_CONTENT 안의 #A8D8FF 같은 색상값만 뽑기 위해. */ REGEXP_SUBSTR(CODE_CONTENT, '#[A-Fa-f0-9]{6}') AS SCHEDULE_COLOR_HEX FROM COMMON_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE_NO = 'SCHDL_CLR' AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
